title: brickellia scoparia var. scoparia
intro: Brickellia scoparia var. scoparia, also known as Ironweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Ironweed has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Ironweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
